summary: Complete testing of Code Red Initiatives major feature update - KPI Tree redesign, simplified categories (ETO/Quality only), and Code Red Pipeline. All 21 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend features verified via Playwright (100%).
passed_tests: Metric categories API returns only ETO and Quality - SUCCESS
Enterprise metrics API returns 8 metrics (4 ETO, 4 Quality) - SUCCESS
KPI Tree API returns hierarchy: Category -> Outcomes -> Initiatives by Status - SUCCESS
Dashboard stats endpoint returns all status counts correctly - SUCCESS
Dashboard initiatives-by-status returns 5 status columns - SUCCESS
Seed endpoint creates 8 metrics and 8 initiatives - SUCCESS
Dashboard loads with embedded KPI Tree section - SUCCESS
KPI Tree shows ETO category with 4 outcomes, 5 initiatives - SUCCESS
KPI Tree shows Quality category with 4 outcomes, 10 initiatives - SUCCESS
Code Red Pipeline shows 4 columns: Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress - SUCCESS
Summary stats at bottom: 8 Business Outcomes, 32 Milestones, 11 Risks, 3 Escalated - SUCCESS
Core Business Outcomes page shows only ETO and Quality categories - SUCCESS
View Full KPI Tree link navigates to /kpi-tree - SUCCESS
Clicking initiative in KPI Tree navigates to detail page - SUCCESS
Initiative detail page displays correctly with milestones, risks, team - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Seed endpoint creates 8 metrics (4 ETO: Engineer To Order Cycle Time, Quote-to-Order Cycle Time, Configuration Accuracy, Engineering Change Order Rate; 4 Quality: Solution Design Accuracy, Order Entry Error Rate, On-Time Delivery Rate, Customer Satisfaction Score) and 8 initiatives with various statuses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major feature update implemented and verified. KPI Tree redesigned with hierarchy: Category (ETO/Quality) -> Outcomes -> Initiatives by Status. Dashboard has embedded KPI Tree section and Code Red Pipeline with 4 columns (Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress). Old categories (Planning, Sales, Delivery, Customer Satisfaction) removed. Navigation includes: Executive Dashboard, Core Business Outcomes, Initiatives, Milestones, Pipeline Process, Risk.
